_doc: Example operator policy. Copy to integrity-policy.json to customize scan behaviour. The plugin works without this file — it's optional tuning, not a hard dependency.
key_rotation_hint: Set HYDRA_STATE_INTEGRITY_HMAC_KEY in the operator's shell. After rotation, re-run scripts/sign-state.sh --all to refresh expected_sigs.

channel_separation.rationale: Even if primary audit.jsonl is corrupted (the very class of attack this plugin defends against), integrity-events.ndjson remains a usable forensic record.
